settings.heading: About
settings.subtext: An independent Sunshine West workshop built on honest advice, quality workmanship and fair, upfront pricing - for every make and model that rolls through the door.

settings.title: Honest, Upfront Pricing
settings.text: A clear quote before any work starts. No surprises and no padded invoices - just a fair price for the job.

settings.title: Quality Workmanship
settings.text: Every job done properly and checked before it leaves. We treat every car like it's our own.

settings.title: All Makes & Models
settings.text: From daily drivers to weekend projects, we service, repair and build across all makes and models.

settings.title: Local & Personal
settings.text: A Sunshine West workshop you can actually talk to. Deal direct with the people doing the work.

settings.title: Proper Mechanical Work, Done Locally
settings.body1: Niche Automotive is an independent workshop in Sunshine West, built on a simple idea - do the job properly, charge a fair price, and give people straight answers about their car.
settings.body2: From routine log book servicing through to performance upgrades, engine builds, conversions and full restorations, we look after all makes and models under one roof. Whatever you drive, you get honest advice and quality work you can rely on.
settings.body3: Alongside the workshop, we stock a growing range of quality second-hand parts, so whether you need a car booked in or a hard-to-find part tracked down, you're in the right place.
settings.points: All makes & models | Fixed, upfront pricing | Warranty-safe servicing | Honest advice, every time
settings.values_lead: No shortcuts, no surprises. A few things we hold ourselves to on every car that comes through the door.
settings.sides_lead: Book your car in for a service or a build, or shop the second-hand parts store - it's all Niche.
settings.side1_text: Log book and general servicing, performance upgrades, engine builds, conversions and restorations - all done in-house on all makes and models.
settings.side2_text: A growing range of quality used parts, added as they come in. Chasing something specific? We can help track down hard-to-find items.
settings.strip_sub: Tell us the make, model and what's going on, and we'll sort you out.

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.
